imageGeneration.seedTooltip: Specific starting value for randomness. Use same Seed to regenerate identical results.

messages.startedGoogleFlow: Started Google Flow refresh. Follow the browser instructions.
messages.startedChatGPTLogin: Started ChatGPT login. Complete actions in the browser.

googleFlow.instructions: Script: refresh-google-flow. Opens Flow, lets you login if needed, captures cookies/localStorage/reCAPTCHA tokens, then saves session file.

chatgpt.instructions: Script: chatgpt-auto-login. Opens chatgpt.com, applies saved session if available; if expired, guides manual login, then saves cookies/local/sessionStorage.

drive.instructions: Enter Client ID and Client Secret, save encrypted to DB. Set up app in Google Cloud Console, configure consent screen, add test users, and set Redirect URI.
drive.exchangeHint: After approve, copy the code from URL/response and paste here to exchange token:
steps: Open Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials.
Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Application type: Web Application).
Save Client ID and Client Secret, paste them into the form and click Save to DB (encrypted).
Click Open Auth URL to generate the authorization URL and approve the consent screen.
After approval, copy the code from the URL (?code=...) and paste into the exchange field.
Click Exchange & Save token to store the Drive token (drive-token.json).
Verify token with Diagnostic; upload features will now use OAuth automatically.

youtube.instructions: Create OAuth Client in Google Cloud, add YouTube scopes, configure Redirect URI, save Client ID/Secret encrypted, open Auth URL, approve and exchange token to save.
youtube.exchangeHint: After approve, copy the code and paste here to exchange token:
steps: Open Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Library → Enable YouTube Data API v3.
Go to Credentials → Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID (Web Application).
Save Client ID and Client Secret, paste into the form and click Save to DB (encrypted).
Click Open Auth URL to generate the authorization URL and approve.
Copy the code from the URL (?code=...) and paste into the exchange field.
Click Exchange & Save token to store the YouTube token (youtube-token.json).
Verify token with Diagnostic; YouTube upload and APIs will use OAuth automatically.
